Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the copied JAR filename to match the new project artifact name.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The old filename 'webscraper-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar' does not exist in the build output of the new project, causing a COPY failure during image build.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version to 21 to align with the migration goal.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles for Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce compatibility with the target runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to explicitly target Java 21 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the generated class files are compatible with Java 21 and rejects usage of APIs removed in Java 21.
